scripts.test:coverage: bun test tests/scheduler.test.ts tests/geo.test.ts tests/mcp-tools.test.ts tests/taskboard.test.ts tests/screenpipe.test.ts tests/dispatch.test.ts tests/briefs.test.ts --coverage && bun test tests/handlers.test.ts && bun test tests/dispatch-integration.test.ts
scripts.stop: bash -c 'PID=$(cat ~/.edith/edith.pid 2>/dev/null) && kill $PID 2>/dev/null && echo "Edith stopped (PID $PID)" || echo "Edith not running"'
